title: LunarTweaks
description: LunarTweaks is a versatile client-side mod featuring a customizable HUD, crosshair tweaks, crystal optimizer, and more — built for PvP players and developers.
body:
**LunarTweaks** is a powerful standalone client-side mod built to deliver a **client-level experience** for PvP enthusiasts and everyday players. With features like a **module browser, fully customizable HUDs, crosshair tweaks, crystal optimization, and much more planned**, it aims to bring the flexibility and polish of larger clients while remaining a lightweight standalone mod.

> **Disclaimer:** This mod is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Lunar Client in any way.**
> It is an independent standalone mod project and is **not a Lunar Client addon, modification, or “Lunar Client tweaks” mod.**

## Requirements

**All versions of this mod require the corresponding version of owo-lib.**

## Feedback & Community

Please join our Discord to report bugs, suggest ideas, and stay up to date with new features:
**[https://discord.com/invite/qSqr9B4KQK](https://discord.com/invite/qSqr9B4KQK)**
